name: wfdf power duos
description: after realizing that the world flying disc federation (WFDF) tournament websites are very nicely formatted for webscraping, i set out to gather my own new ultimate frisbee stats.

name: ridetogether
description: a 6-level puzzle game i made for a friend's birthday! puzzles designed by me, app developed by me, and art done by my lovely younger sister.

name: misinformation
description: in the early months of the pandemic, a friend and i set out to analyze the role that students on twitter played in the spread of covid-19 misinformation.

name: dragon link
description: a better version of when2meet that eases group scheduling with google calendar integration, built for mit's 2022 web.lab competition.

name: food security box
description: store dorm food safely with this elaborate security system, made for 6.08 embedded systems spring 2022
